items.title: Thunder’s Rotation after losing Isaiah, Dort,Wiggins. Starters: SGA, Cason, J Dub, Chet, Hartenstein. Bench: Ajay, McCain,Caruso, Kenrich, Jaylin, Aday, Stirtz.
items.author: OrganicHunt952
items.body_excerpt: What are your impressions on OKC’s depth now they have lost some of their depth pieces, due to the salary cap? Last year SGA was able to rest in 4th quarters because of blow outs and depth. Was a big reason why they had a stellar regular season record, even with numerous…

items.title: Forget the cash savings (which will be significant), it was simply time for OKC to move on from Lu Dort. JDub can assume the bigger wing defensive assignments. Cason Wallace still around for point-of-attack defense. Ajay Mitchell is ready. McCain deserves minutes. OKC needs to se
items.author: Jon Hamm
items.body_excerpt: Forget the cash savings (which will be significant), it was simply time for OKC to move on from Lu Dort. JDub can assume the bigger wing defensive assignments. Cason Wallace still around for point-of-attack defense. Ajay Mitchell is ready. McCain deserves minutes. OKC needs to see what Topic is.
